[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1111111111 a
2 1111111111 a
3 1111111111 a
4 1101001010 5
5 1011000000 3
6 0110110111 7
7 0110111111 8

01 10 0110111111 8 match 7
12 21 1111111111 a match 0 1 2 3
23 32 1011111000 6
34 43 1101111000 6
45 54 1101011010 6
56 65 0111011110 7
67 76 0111111110 8
70 07 0111111111 9

02 20 1011111101 8
13 31 1101111111 9
24 42 1111011000 6
35 53 1101111010 7
46 64 1111011100 7
57 75 0101111010 6
60 06 0111111101 8
71 17 0101111111 8

03 30 1011111101 8
14 41 1100111111 8
25 52 1111011010 7
36 63 1111111100 8
47 74 1101111010 7
50 05 0111111111 9
61 16 0111111111 9
72 27 1111111010 8

04 40 1110110101 7
15 51 0101111111 8
26 62 1111011100 7
37 73 1101111010 7
[completion]
0 12 21
1 12 21
2 12 21

5 absent

12 23x
